description: DPI probe monitor: DNS integrity (UDP vs DoH, stub IPs), CDN fat-probe scan per provider/ASN, Telegram DL/UL throughput and DC reachability. Each DPI probe is node-level (no proxy dimension); use the $node variable to filter by instance.

spec.description: Nodes whose last DNS DPI probe completed successfully (xray_dpi_dns_up == 1).
spec.title: Nodes With DPI Probes

spec.description: Average ratio of OK-verdict domains across all nodes that ran a DNS DPI probe.
spec.title: Avg DNS OK %

spec.description: Nodes where the Telegram probe returned an overall verdict of 'blocked'.
spec.title: Nodes w/ Telegram Blocked

spec.description: Nodes whose overall CDN fat-probe verdict is 'blocked' (most providers failed).
spec.title: Nodes w/ CDN Blocked

spec.description: Maximum number of ISP stub/splash IPs harvested by DNS DPI across all nodes. Non-zero means some resolver on some node is being redirected to a block page.
spec.title: Max Stub IPs

spec.description: Seconds since the most recent DNS DPI probe completed. DPI probes run every SERVE_DPI_INTERVAL seconds (default 1800).
spec.title: Last DPI Run Age

spec.description: DNS DPI verdict breakdown across all probed domains on selected nodes. Verdicts: ok, spoof, intercept, fake_nxdomain, fake_empty, doh_blocked, all_dead.
spec.title: DNS Verdict Distribution

spec.description: Top 15 nodes ranked by number of domains with a non-OK DNS verdict (spoof, intercept, fake_nxdomain, fake_empty, doh_blocked, all_dead).
spec.title: Most Affected Nodes (DNS)

spec.description: Per-node DNS transport health: UDP availability, DoH availability, and count of harvested stub/splash IPs (non-zero = ISP spoofing).
spec.title: DNS Transport & Stub IPs (per node)

spec.description: Per-domain DNS DPI verdict across all probed nodes. Only the currently active verdict row is shown for each (domain, node) pair.
spec.title: DNS Domain × Node Verdicts

spec.description: DNS verdict counts summed across all selected nodes over time. Spikes in non-OK verdicts indicate DNS censorship events.
spec.title: DNS Verdicts Over Time

spec.description: Overall CDN fat-probe verdict per node (ok / partial / blocked). Aggregated from per-provider verdicts.
spec.title: CDN Overall Verdict (per node)

spec.expr: sum by (provider) (xray_dpi_cdn_provider_targets_blocked{job="xray-analyzer-nodes", instance=~"$node"}) / clamp_min(sum by (provider) (xray_dpi_cdn_provider_targets_total{job="xray-analyzer-nodes", instance=~"$node"}), 1) * 100

spec.description: Share of CDN/hosting targets that failed the 16–20KB fat-probe, aggregated across all selected nodes. High % = DPI actively blocking that provider.
spec.title: CDN Block Rate by Provider (%)

spec.description: Per-provider CDN fat-probe stats: total targets, passed (OK), blocked (16-20KB DPI), errored, and overall provider verdict. Grouped by node × provider × ASN.
spec.title: CDN Provider × Node Detail

spec.expr: sum by (instance) (xray_dpi_cdn_provider_targets_blocked{job="xray-analyzer-nodes", instance=~"$node"}) / clamp_min(sum by (instance) (xray_dpi_cdn_provider_targets_total{job="xray-analyzer-nodes", instance=~"$node"}), 1) * 100

spec.description: Node-level CDN block rate over time. A rising line means the fat-probe is failing on more targets — a direct signal of 16–20 KB DPI throttling.
spec.title: CDN Block Rate Over Time (per node)

spec.description: Telegram overall verdict per node: ok / slow / partial / blocked / error.
spec.title: Telegram Verdict (per node)

spec.description: Average Telegram download throughput per node in the last probe (bytes / duration).
spec.title: Telegram DL Throughput

spec.description: Average Telegram upload throughput per node in the last probe (bytes / duration).
spec.title: Telegram UL Throughput

spec.description: Percentage of Telegram data centers (of 5) reachable by TCP from each node. Lower % = more DCs blocked.
spec.title: Telegram DC Reachability %

spec.description: Per-node Telegram DL/UL status and raw byte counts, plus reachable Telegram DCs.
spec.title: Telegram Detail (per node)

spec.description: Per-node Telegram DL and UL throughput over time. Sustained drops below 500 KB/s DL (1 MB/s nominal) indicate DPI-driven throttling.
spec.title: Telegram Throughput Over Time

spec.description: Probe health per node: up/down status, last run duration, and age since last run (seconds).
spec.title: Probe Health (per node)

title: Xray Analyzer — DPI monitor
